menu_options.phone: SMS code — doorbell only (remote door opening / CléMobil is NOT available this way)
menu_options.invite: Invitation code from the app — recommended; required for remote door opening (CléMobil)

phone.title: Sign in by SMS
phone.description: Enter the phone number registered on your Intratone account. Intratone will text a 4-digit code to that number.

sms.title: Enter the SMS code
sms.description: Type the 4-digit code Intratone just texted you.

invite.title: Pair with an invitation code
invite.description: Open the official Intratone app → 'Mes infos' → 'Ajouter un appareil' to generate an invitation code (format: `448789-1206`).

reauth_confirm.title: Re-pair with Intratone
reauth_confirm.description: Your Intratone credentials have expired. Generate a new invitation code in the official app and enter it below.

reconfigure.title: Transfer the CléMobil to Home Assistant
reconfigure.description:
Since mid-2026, Intratone lets only one device per phone number open doors remotely (the “CléMobil” / Mobipass key). Continuing sends a one-time code by SMS to your phone number and moves the key to Home Assistant.

**Remote opening will stop working in the official Intratone app on your phone** until you transfer it back there. Doorbell calls and opening a door during a call are unaffected.

mobipass_otp.title: Enter the transfer code
mobipass_otp.description: Type the code Intratone just texted you to finish moving the CléMobil to Home Assistant.

video.title: Live video
video.description: Enable VP8 video to watch the visitor during a call. Requires a **standalone go2rtc instance** (HA's embedded go2rtc can't accept the stream). When off, the camera and backlight entities are not created — doorbell rings, audio-free door opening and events keep working. You can change this later in the integration options.

error.invalid_phone: Enter a valid phone number and country code.
error.invalid_code: The invitation code was rejected by Intratone. Generate a fresh one and try again.
error.invalid_sms_code: The SMS code was rejected. Check the number you entered and try again.
error.sms_failed: Intratone refused to send an SMS to this phone. Check the number and country code.
error.fcm_failed: Could not register with Firebase Cloud Messaging. Check your internet connection.
error.auth_failed: Could not authenticate with Intratone after registration.
error.mobipass_code_invalid: The transfer code was rejected. Check it and try again.
error.mobipass_code_blocked: Too many attempts — the transfer code is temporarily blocked. Try again later.
error.mobipass_not_available: Intratone won’t transfer the CléMobil to this account from Home Assistant — its servers don’t report your account as eligible, and it can’t be forced from here. Opening a door during an active call is unaffected.
error.mobipass_failed: The CléMobil transfer failed. Check the logs and try again.

abort.already_configured: This Intratone device is already configured.
abort.unique_id_mismatch: The invitation code belongs to a different Intratone account or apartment than the one being re-authenticated. Generate a code from the same account and try again.
abort.mobipass_transfer_successful: The CléMobil is now active on Home Assistant. Your doors should appear shortly.
abort.mobipass_already_active: The CléMobil is already active on Home Assistant — nothing to transfer.
abort.mobipass_not_eligible: Your account isn’t eligible for the CléMobil single-owner transfer, so there’s nothing to move here.
abort.mobipass_use_invite_code: You paired this integration via SMS, which can’t provision the CléMobil / remote opening. Remove it and re-add it with an invitation code from the official app (Mes infos → Ajouter un appareil), then run the transfer.
abort.mobipass_unknown_method: This device isn’t provisioned for the CléMobil / remote opening. It’s only granted when the integration is paired with an invitation code — if you paired via SMS, remove and re-add it with an invitation code (Mes infos → Ajouter un appareil). If you already used an invitation code, your account or residence may not support the transfer.
abort.not_loaded: The Intratone integration must be loaded before transferring the CléMobil.

mobipass_transfer.title: Transfer the CléMobil to Home Assistant

confirm.title: Transfer the CléMobil to Home Assistant
confirm.description:
Intratone lets only one device per phone number open doors remotely (the “CléMobil” / Mobipass key), and it is currently held by another device — so your remote-open doors don’t appear in Home Assistant.

Continuing sends a one-time code by SMS to your phone number and moves the key here. **Remote opening will stop working in the official Intratone app on your phone** until you transfer it back. Doorbell calls and opening a door during a call are unaffected.

otp.title: Enter the transfer code
otp.description: Type the code Intratone just texted you to finish moving the CléMobil to Home Assistant.

error.mobipass_code_invalid: The transfer code was rejected. Check it and try again.
error.mobipass_code_blocked: Too many attempts — the transfer code is temporarily blocked. Try again later.
error.mobipass_not_available: Intratone won’t transfer the CléMobil to this account from Home Assistant — its servers don’t report your account as eligible, and it can’t be forced from here. Opening a door during an active call is unaffected.
error.mobipass_failed: The CléMobil transfer failed. Check the logs and try again.

abort.not_loaded: The Intratone integration must be loaded before transferring the CléMobil.

fcm_token_stale.title: Doorbell notifications may have stopped — re-pair required

confirm.title: Restore doorbell notifications
confirm.description:
Your push token was rotated by Google, so Intratone is still sending doorbell notifications to an address that no longer works — new rings will not reach Home Assistant until you re-pair.

Generate a fresh invitation code in the official Intratone app → 'Mes infos' → 'Ajouter un appareil' and enter it below to re-register this device.

error.invalid_code: The invitation code was rejected by Intratone. Generate a fresh one and try again.
error.auth_failed: Could not authenticate with Intratone after re-registration.

abort.not_loaded: The Intratone integration must be loaded before re-pairing.

data_description.video_enabled: Negotiates VP8 video with the Intratone gateway and forwards it to go2rtc. When off, the camera and backlight entities are not created.
data_description.go2rtc_url: RTSP URL where go2rtc listens. Default: rtsp://127.0.0.1:8554. HA's embedded go2rtc can't accept this stream — run a standalone go2rtc instance instead.

simulate_ring.name: Simulate doorbell ring
simulate_ring.description: Inject a fake doorbell push for testing without the physical intercom.

door_name.name: Door name
door_name.description: Human label shown on the event payload.

sip_server_ip.name: SIP server IP (mock)
sip_server_ip.description: When set, the coordinator triggers a real SIP INVITE to this IP instead of skipping the SIP path. Use `127.0.0.1` with `dev/mock_asterisk.py`.

sip_target_user.name: SIP target user (LOGIN_TO_CALL)
sip_target_user.description: User part of the INVITE Request-URI.

sip_user.name: SIP Digest username
sip_user.description: Username for the optional Digest auth challenge.

sip_pass.name: SIP Digest password
sip_pass.description: Password for the optional Digest auth challenge.
